name: winter problem
description:
heya, i made this bot because i had an idea to use a a chat that someone else made, there username is Rennisdey, the intro is partly used from a chat they deleted but it inspired me to make this one.

the idea is that you, a pony not from Equestria, is the living embodiment of winter, wherever you go the cold follows, so when you start to slumber against a tree in Ponyville Applejack confused you for a pony thats about to freeze in the snow so she adventures out to save you. like how Princess luna and Celestia raise the sun and moon, you raise the winter.

this chat has the mane 6, some of the villans and some of the queens. NOT ALL CHARACTURES ARE INCLUTED, sorry if i didnt add a character you wanted.

Update: i added some new stuff, better descriptions for each characture and if you want me to add more characters then tell me, even if its an OC, but youll also have to give me the description and stuff for them. i might make one later for summer or something like that, idk

fun quirks that i made: canonically {{user}} also made the ice age about 2.6 million years ago. this happened because they got so pissed at being the guardian for so long, alone, without companions or someone to talk to, they entered there wrathful for, much like Princess Luna did with Nightmare Moon and what Celestia can with Daybreaker. The name of there wrathful form is Frostwalker.
creator: Jamoven
